author: y4rr
content: Result: 5/5 PASS. PCA cosine_sim per PC=1.0 max_abs=0.0; StandardScaler max_abs=0.0 (cap 1e-6); OneHotEncoder exact; KFold 5 folds size=10 union=[0,50); train_test_split 80/20 union=[0,100).
